_comment: Repo-tracked CURATED tuning catalog for custom Orpheus voices. Machine-independent (folder name + token + tuning only — the models ROOT is resolved per-machine). This file is the AUTHORITATIVE source for per-voice tuning and OVERLAYS the per-machine runtime install manifest (models.json in the models dir): the runtime manifest records what is installed WHERE (dir/token/addedAt, written by the installer); this catalog overrides the curated tuning fields (label, token, caps, backends, postRenderFilter, sentenceGap, measuredSentenceGapS, ...). Catalog wins for any field it declares. Commit + push to propagate identical tuning to every machine (Windows/WSL/Mac). measuredSentenceGapS = the natural inter-sentence gap MEASURED from the training source (end-of-word to start-of-next-word, chapter gaps >2s excluded) — the target 'we are shooting for'. sentenceGap = the tuned ASSEMBLY-time inject; set it only after a generation probe shows how much the model self-produces. Absent sentenceGap => untested => the assembly page shows the 0.6s universal default (DEFAULT_SENTENCE_GAP).

models.label: Third Reich (Sean Pratt)
models._gapNote: Source (Sean Pratt, nonfiction) inter-sentence gap: median 1.43s over 4725 prose boundaries (>2s section gaps excluded; ~1.23s at a tighter <=1.5s cap that drops paragraph pauses). GENERATED-gap probe 2026-07-23 (orpheus-render, pad off): the model self-produces ~0.5s natural gap — same as deathstalker/mistborn/ender, a base-model/recipe property, NOT learned per-narrator. Chose sentenceGap 0.3 => ~0.8s assembled, matching the other narrators' feel; full source-match (~+0.9s to reach 1.4s) risks a draggy/mechanical cadence. A/B against 0 owed.

models.label: Mistborn (Michael Kramer)
models.note: rv1 raw-verbatim keeper 2026-07-21: verbatim clips (natural pauses/tails), brightest-2h curation, EOS via logit boost 8@2.0, pen 1.10 = book pause match (ds ep440 / mb ep330; greedy gate 20/20; see TESTING_BIBLE)
models._gapNote: Measured 2026-07-23 from The Final Empire (Michael Kramer): prose inter-sentence gap median 0.80s / mean 0.75s over 9397 narration boundaries (dialogue excluded; chapter gaps >2s excluded). Cross-checked against Alloy of Law (same narrator): identical prose median 0.80s — confirms book-exact. sentenceGap (inject) left unset pending a generation probe.
